description_long: This is a single bed frame with a decorative, arched headboard featuring subtle wood grain patterns and carved detailing. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood or wood-like material, with visible horizontal slats for mattress support. The foot of the bed is lower and simpler, with some carved accents matching the headboard's style. The side rails are straight and unadorned, giving the bed a clean, classic look. The overall finish is matte, and the color is a pale grayish-white, contributing to a neutral, versatile appearance. There is no mattress or bedding present, exposing the slatted support structure.
description: A light-colored, single bed frame with an arched, carved headboard and visible wooden slats, finished in a pale matte tone.
description_view_0: The view shows the decorative, arched headboard with subtle wood grain and carved details.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the bed, the slatted base, and the profile of the headboard.
description_view_2: The front view displays both the headboard and footboard, as well as the full slatted support structure.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the bed's length, slats, and headboard profile.
